Kidplokio 8pc Urban City Police Friction Powered Toy Cars with Play Mat, Blue,

Calling all little cops in training! This fun police themed playset includes one play mat, two police vehicles and five traffic signs. Toddlers and little kids will love zooming all over town, policing the next emergency with the friction powered toy car and airplane toy!

Featuring an airplane toy and toy car, these police themed vehicles are easy to play with once they understand the mechanics of friction power! With a simple pull, little ones can crime fight all across the city from one accident to the next! In addition to the toy car and airplane toy, this play set comes with an awesome felt play mat. Measuring 31 x 27 inches (80cm x 70cm), this felt play mat features a sprawling urban city map with lots of pit stops for little policemen or policewomen to drive to; when playtime is over, the play mat folds up neatly for tidy storage.

Key Features

  • URBAN CITY TOY CARS PLAYSET: Calling all little cops in training! This fun police themed playset includes one play mat, two police vehicles and five traffic signs; kids will love policing all over town with the friction powered toy car and toy airplane!
  • POLICE FRICTION POWERED TOYS: Featuring an airplane toy and toy car, these police themed vehicles are easy to play with! With a simple pull, little ones can crime fight all over town from one emergency to the next!
  • AWESOME URBAN CITY PLAY MAT: Measuring 31 x 27 inches (80cm x 70cm), this super fun felt play mat features a sprawling urban city map with lots of pit stops for little policemen to drive to; when playtime is over, the play mat folds up neatly for tidy storage
  • PRETEND PLAY AND FINE MOTOR TOYS: Not only will your little hero be thrilled conjuring up lots of imaginative pretend play rescue missions, kids will also developing their fine motor skills, hand eye coordination and dexterity maneuvering the toy cars, airplane toy and traffic signs
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 11 x 3 x 16 inches; Weight: 1.02lbs; Color: Blue: Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KP-RLUT-P21
  • UPC: 810058480279
  • Color: Police Station

And, not only will your little hero be thrilled conjuring up lots of imaginative pretend play police scenarios, kids will also be developing their fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination and dexterity while maneuvering the toy cars, airplane toy and traffic signs across the play mat. A great value toy car playset kids can use in conjunction with other toys too, sure to spark imagination and playtime creativity!

Let the policing begin!

Recommended Ages: 3+

Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts
